title: SV interface  bug
body:
---


Author Name: **Thomas J Whatson**
Original Redmine Issue: 1026 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2016-01-20


---

``` When I register a SV interface signal on the input of my module, the registered signal shows to be asserted at the same clk cycle, whereas it should go high 1 clk later. 
```

``` Please see dut.sv for details here: https://yadi.sk/d/V-AmrwJ5nTKK9 
```
